title: loadng.c: seen table prune uses unsafe timestamp arithmetic
notes:
Commit: 822fdb482
Signed 32-bit diff already present in prune_seen_locked(), check_and_mark(), and cache expiry (with SECURITY notes). Prevents wraparound and future-timestamp misbehavior. Consistent with dtn.c and Rust impl. All tests pass. P2 fixed.
close_reason: Timestamp arithmetic hardened with signed int32_t casts; commit 822fdb482
